quotes.structure: Imperative summons acknowledging ambiguous relationship, then revealing practical need.
rhetorical-dna: Repetition of 'come' (three times) creates incantatory rhythm
Binary framing ('friend or traitor') collapses moral categories—the distinction doesn't matter
Shift from grandiose invitation to pragmatic demand
Register: imperial, commanding, yet oddly intimate
quotes.respecification-seed: A powerful figure summons an old associate whose loyalty is uncertain, revealing they need something the other possesses.

quotes.structure: Dismissive insult + declaration of nature + rhetorical question exposing futility.
rhetorical-dna: Three short punchy sentences escalating in certainty
Rhetorical question implies the answer is 'you cannot'
The simplicity of the declaration is the power—no elaboration needed
Register: contemptuous, almost pitying
quotes.respecification-seed: A being of supreme power dismisses an attacker's threat as categorically impossible.

quotes.structure: Denial of defeat + declaration of resurgence with liberationist purpose.
rhetorical-dna: Classic 'not dead but sleeping' reversal—what enemies thought was victory was merely dormancy
Tense shift from past passivity to present action
Dual enemy: external occupiers + false spiritual authorities
Register: prophetic, collective, messianic
quotes.respecification-seed: A leader announces the return of a defeated faction, framing resurgence as liberation from both foreign and spiritual tyranny.

quotes.structure: Declaration of gift-giving purpose + speculative invitation to imagine freedom.
rhetorical-dna: First sentence: benevolent framing of power-sharing
Second sentence: rhetorical question opens rather than closes—genuinely speculative
Liberation is from fear, not from the powers themselves
Register: philosophical, generous, subtly utopian
quotes.respecification-seed: A figure offering transcendence frames their gift as freedom from existential terror, inviting others to imagine what lies beyond.

quotes.structure: Formal greeting by title + announcement of prepared reception.
rhetorical-dna: Two short sentences, hospitable surface
Title instead of name—recognizes the role, not the person
'Prepared a place' carries ominous biblical resonance—ambiguously threatening or genuine
Register: ceremonial, ominous hospitality
quotes.respecification-seed: A host greets a prophesied visitor by title, the welcome's sincerity deliberately unclear.

quotes.structure: Greeting + vision of alliance toward shared governance and expulsion of enemies.
rhetorical-dna: 'Together we shall'—assumes alliance without asking for it
Dyadic framing of authority (abstract + concrete)
Dehumanizing enemy
Register: formal, martial, nationalist
quotes.respecification-seed: A former ally greets a returning figure, presuming partnership in driving out occupiers and restoring rightful order.

quotes.structure: Symmetrical declaration of origin and terminus + formal invitation to final speech.
rhetorical-dna: Perfect parallelism ('began here' / 'end here')—structural inevitability
Shift from declarative to interrogative
'Parting words' is both ceremonial and fatal
Register: resigned, almost ritual, acknowledging gravity
quotes.respecification-seed: At the site where everything started, a figure announces the final confrontation and offers the opponent a last chance to speak.

quotes.structure: Nostalgic invocation of past bond + claim of unmatched loyalty.
rhetorical-dna: 'Once we were'—elegiac tone acknowledging rupture
Doubled intensifiers (friends and brothers, peace and war)
Superlative claim of service—positioning self as the ultimate loyal one
Register: grieved, almost reproachful, dignified
quotes.respecification-seed: A former ally reminds one who betrayed (or feels betrayed by) them of their shared history, asserting no one served more faithfully.

quotes.structure: Imperative summons acknowledging hardship of journey + affirmation of reception.
rhetorical-dna: Short, incantatory sentences
'Through fire and war'—acknowledges the cost of approach
'I welcome you'—destination is worth the journey
Register: almost tender beneath the grandiosity
quotes.respecification-seed: A figure at the center of conflict invites another to reach them despite all obstacles, promising welcome at journey's end.

quotes.structure: Declaration of finality + intensified acknowledgment of its quality.
rhetorical-dna: Two sentences, second elaborating first
Repetition for emphasis—not just end, but hard end
No denial, no defiance—pure acceptance
Register: mournful, exhausted, dignified in defeat
quotes.respecification-seed: A figure facing final defeat acknowledges the conclusion without evasion, letting the bitterness speak.
